race.comment: FINE WINE (8) returned from a break with a classy on-pace win over 1000m at Kembla Grange in the soft (7) conditions. Can overcome the sticky map and continue on her winning ways. ZING TO ME (3) starting to hit her straps this campaign with the two commanding victories. Proved the Maiden win was no fluke when she launched late from back in the field with a gritty win in BM64 class over 900m at Newcastle. Will go back from the draw and be ridden for luck. PERLE DE CHOCOLAT (10) doesn't win out of turn and comes back in trip with the blinkers being added. Never looked a danger from the awkward barrier when eighth over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Returns from a let-up and can surprise some of her more fancied rivals. COOL STORM (2) back in grade for this after fading late when fourth over 1100m at Scone in BM82 class. Ticks a few boxes today and expected to take a hand in the fin fish.
